title: myriocephalus scalpellus
intro: Myriocephalus scalpellus, also known as Scalp Clover or Myriocephalus, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues and promoting wound healing due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Myriocephalus scalpellus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
